name: mofa-fm
author: hagency
description: Voice management and TTS with custom voice cloning via ominix-api

install.label: OminiX API server (Apple Silicon TTS inference)

ominix-api.description: Local inference server for Qwen3 TTS with voice cloning on Apple Silicon

ominix-mlx.description: MLX inference runtime for Qwen3-TTS on Apple Silicon

tools.name: fm_tts
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text. Supports preset voices and custom saved voices. If a custom voice name is given, voice cloning is used automatically. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

voice.description: Voice name: a preset ('vivian', 'serena', 'ryan', etc.) or a saved custom voice name. Default: 'vivian' or the user's default voice.

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/crew_fm_tts_<timestamp>.wav

prompt.description: Style/emotion prompt to control how the voice speaks. Works with both preset and cloned voices. Verified Chinese prompts: excited='用兴奋激动的语气说话，充满热情和活力', sad='用悲伤失望的语气说话，声音低沉，语速缓慢', cheerful='用开朗愉快的语气说话，声音明亮上扬，节奏轻快', shout='用大声喊叫的方式说话，声音高亢有力，语速快', sarcastic='用讽刺嘲讽的语气说话，语调阴阳怪气，拖长尾音', soft='用温柔轻柔的语气说话', panic='用惊慌恐惧的语气说话，声音颤抖，语速急促'. Custom prompts also supported.

speed.description: Speed factor: >1.0 = faster, <1.0 = slower. Range 0.5-2.0. Default: 1.0

tools.name: fm_voice_save
tools.description: Save an audio file as a named custom voice for future TTS use. The audio should be 3-10 seconds of clear speech from the target speaker. Once saved, use the name with fm_tts to synthesize speech in that voice.

name.description: Name for the voice (alphanumeric and underscores only, e.g. 'my_voice', 'boss')

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to use as voice reference

tools.name: fm_voice_list
tools.description: List all available voices: both preset voices and saved custom voices.

tools.name: fm_voice_delete
tools.description: Delete a saved custom voice by name.

name.description: Name of the custom voice to delete
